Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip C. Monrad, Esq. LEONARD CARDER, 1330 Broadway, Suite 1450, Oakland CA 94612., 510-272-0169, on behalf of petitioner and moving party Unite Here! Wayne K. Snodgrass, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, City Hall, Room 234, 1 Dr. Carlton B. Goodlett Place, San Francisco, CA 94102-4682, 415-554-4675, appearing for defendant and opposing party City and County of San Francisco. Casey McNamara, Esq. FOLGER LEVIN & KAHN, Embarcadero Center West, 275 Battery Street, 23rd Floor, San Francisco, CA 94111, 415-986-2800, present for third party hotel group.

After argument the matter was continued. Counsel are to meet and confer to set dates for briefings of sur-opposition and sur-reply. Counsel shall agree upon a date for further hearing and contact the clerk in Department 306 to set the hearing date of their choice. Honorable Kevin M. McCarthy. Reported by Mitch Lyon CSR# 6840 (302/KMM/JT)
